heading: Use of Federal Parent Locator Service in connection with enforcement or determination of child custody in cases of parental kidnaping of child
label: 663 Use of Federal Parent Locator Service in connection with enforcement or determination of child custody in cases of parental kidnaping of child

children.heading: Agreements with States for use of Federal Parent Locator Service
children.label: a Agreements with States for use of Federal Parent Locator Service

children.text: enforcing any State or Federal law with respect to the unlawful taking or restraint of a child; or
making or enforcing a child custody or visitation determination.

children.heading: Requests from authorized persons for information
children.label: b Requests from authorized persons for information

children.text: enforcing any State or Federal law with respect to the unlawful taking or restraint of a child; or
making or enforcing a child custody or visitation determination.

children.heading: Information which may be disclosed
children.label: c Information which may be disclosed
children.text: Information authorized to be provided by the Secretary under subsection (a), (b), (e), or (f) shall be subject to the same conditions with respect to disclosure as information authorized to be provided under , and a request for information by the Secretary under this section shall be considered to be a request for information under which is authorized to be provided under such section. Only information as to the most recent address and place of employment of any parent or child shall be provided under this section.section 653 of this titlesection 653 of this title

children.heading: “Custody or visitation determination” and “authorized person” defined
children.label: d “Custody or visitation determination” and “authorized person” defined

children.text: the term “custody or visitation determination” means a judgment, decree, or other order of a court providing for the custody or visitation of a child, and includes permanent and temporary orders, and initial orders and modification;

children.label: A
children.text: any agent or attorney of any State having an agreement under this section, who has the duty or authority under the law of such State to enforce a child custody or visitation determination;

children.label: B
children.text: any court having jurisdiction to make or enforce such a child custody or visitation determination, or any agent of such court; and

children.label: C
children.text: any agent or attorney of the United States, or of a State having an agreement under this section, who has the duty or authority to investigate, enforce, or bring a prosecution with respect to the unlawful taking or restraint of a child.

children.heading: Agreement on use of Federal Parent Locator Service with United States Central Authority under Convention on the Civil Aspects of International Child Abduction
children.label: e Agreement on use of Federal Parent Locator Service with United States Central Authority under Convention on the Civil Aspects of International Child Abduction
children.text: The Secretary shall enter into an agreement with the Central Authority designated by the President in accordance with , under which the services of the Federal Parent Locator Service established under shall be made available to such Central Authority upon its request for the purpose of locating any parent or child on behalf of an applicant to such Central Authority within the meaning of . The Federal Parent Locator Service shall charge no fees for services requested pursuant to this subsection.section 9006 of title 22section 653 of this titlesection 9002(1) of title 22

children.heading: Agreement to assist in locating missing children under Federal Parent Locator Service
children.label: f Agreement to assist in locating missing children under Federal Parent Locator Service

children.text: enforcing any State or Federal law with respect to the unlawful taking or restraint of a child, or
making or enforcing a child custody or visitation determination.
